properties.description: Detects a threat actor actively clearing the Windows Security or System event logs. Designed for immediate containment of post-compromise, anti-forensic activity.

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: The threat actor using the account '{{UserAccount}}' successfully cleared the {{Log_Type}} on machine {{HostName}}. Check the Custom Details pane for the exact Event ID and the direct URL to investigate the compromised host.
